Reinforcement Pods

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search
Mechanics
Missions
Objectives
Reinforcement Pods
Reinforcement Pods
Optional
Optional Objective Info
Minimum Difficulty
Trivial
Maximum Difficulty
Super Helldive
Faction
 Super Earth Federation
Stratagems
Objective
Reinforcement Pods
Link Hellpods to Destroyer
Stratagem Details
Stratagem Code
“

Hellpods will be deployed to this location upon mission launch. Due to the Super Destroyer's absence, normal reinforcement will be unavailable. Securing this site will give access to additional reinforcements, who will deploy directly from this location.

— Mission Briefing

Reinforcement Pods is a Commando Mission exclusive Optional Objective in Helldivers 2. Helldivers are tasked with activating them, granting additional reinforcements to use while the Super Destroyer is away.

Contents

  • 1 Objective Steps
  • 2 Tactical Information
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery
  • 5 Change History

Objective Steps

  • Establish connection to Super Destroyer to secure reinforcements.
    • Entering the stratagem code will start to establish the link. After 10 seconds, the link will be completed, granting 3 additional reinforcements.
  • Reward: 200 Requisition Slips, 50 Experience, 3 Reinforcements

Tactical Information

  • When Reinforcement Pods have been successfully connected to the destroyer, their glowing ring will change from a blinking yellow to a solid green.
  • When a Helldiver dies and is reinforced, they will deploy from the group of pods nearest to whoever called the reinforcements.

Trivia

  • At the start of the mission, it is possible to see the Reinforcement Pods being launched should the player choose to deploy near the optional objective.
  • When a Helldiver is deployed from a Reinforcement Pod, there is still visible frosting from cryo-stasis, this fades after a short time.
  • Similar to the Upload Escape Pod Data mission, this side objective is bugged to reset Automaton reinforcement cooldowns upon entering the stratagem code. This means a Bot Drop can happen again much quicker than is normal while completing this mission.

Gallery

  • A group of unlinked Reinforcement Pods
  • A group of connected Reinforcement Pods

Change History

Patch
Description

1.005.002
2026-01-22

Addition

  • Added to the game.
